mapper.sql: select g.goods_id, g.seller_id, g.category_id, g.title, g.price, g.original_price, g.quality, g.description, g.trade_place, g.contact_way, g.goods_status, g.audit_user_id, g.audit_time, g.audit_remark, g.view_count, g.favorite_count, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.del_flag, g.remark, c.category_name as category_name, s.student_no as seller_student_no, s.nickname as seller_nickname, s.avatar as seller_avatar, u.user_name as audit_user_name from tr_trade_goods g left join tr_trade_category c on c.category_id = g.category_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join tr_student_user s on s.user_id = g.seller_id and s.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user u on u.user_id = g.audit_user_id
mapper.insert:
insert into tr_trade_goods
seller_id, category_id, title, price, original_price, quality, description, trade_place, contact_way, goods_status, audit_user_id, audit_time, audit_remark, view_count, favorite_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark,
#{sellerId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{quality}, #{description}, #{tradePlace}, #{contactWay}, #{goodsStatus}, #{auditUserId}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{viewCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update tr_trade_goods set goods_status = #{goodsStatus}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_goods set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId}

update tr_trade_goods set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where goods_id in
#{goodsId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from tr_trade_goods where del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from tr_trade_goods where del_flag = '0' and goods_status = '0'
select count(1) from tr_trade_goods where del_flag = '0' and goods_status = '1'

select c.category_id as categoryId, c.category_name as categoryName, count(distinct g.goods_id) as goodsCount, count(distinct case when o.order_status = '3' and o.del_flag = '0' then o.order_id end) as completedOrderCount from tr_trade_category c left join tr_trade_goods g on c.category_id = g.category_id and g.del_flag = '0' and g.goods_status in ('1', '4') left join tr_trade_order o on g.goods_id = o.goods_id and o.del_flag = '0' where c.del_flag = '0' group by c.category_id, c.category_name, c.sort order by c.sort asc, c.category_id asc

select g.goods_id, g.seller_id, g.category_id, g.title, g.price, g.original_price, g.quality, g.description, g.trade_place, g.contact_way, g.goods_status, g.audit_user_id, g.audit_time, g.audit_remark, g.view_count, g.favorite_count, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.del_flag, g.remark from tr_trade_goods g where g.del_flag = '0' and g.seller_id = #{sellerId} and g.title = #{title} limit 1
mapper.sql: g.goods_id, g.seller_id, g.category_id, g.title, g.price, g.original_price, g.quality, g.description, g.trade_place, g.contact_way, g.goods_status, g.audit_user_id, g.audit_time, g.audit_remark, g.view_count, g.favorite_count, g.del_flag, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark, s.student_no as seller_student_no, s.nickname as seller_nickname, s.avatar as seller_avatar, c.category_name as category_name, (select group_concat(i.image_url order by i.sort asc, i.image_id asc) from tr_trade_goods_image i where i.goods_id = g.goods_id and i.del_flag = '0') as image_urls

g.goods_id, g.seller_id, g.category_id, g.title, g.price, g.original_price, g.quality, g.description, g.trade_place, g.goods_status, g.view_count, g.favorite_count, g.create_time, g.update_time, g.remark, s.nickname as seller_nickname, s.avatar as seller_avatar, c.category_name as category_name, (select group_concat(i.image_url order by i.sort asc, i.image_id asc) from tr_trade_goods_image i where i.goods_id = g.goods_id and i.del_flag = '0') as image_urls
from tr_trade_goods g left join tr_student_user s on s.user_id = g.seller_id and s.del_flag = '0' left join tr_trade_category c on c.category_id = g.category_id and c.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select goods_id, seller_id, category_id, title, price, original_price, quality, description, trade_place, contact_way, goods_status, audit_user_id, audit_time, audit_remark, view_count, favorite_count, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from tr_trade_goods where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0' for update
mapper.update: update tr_trade_goods set view_count = view_count + #{delta} where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_goods set favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_goods set favorite_count = favorite_count - 1 where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0' and favorite_count > 0
update tr_trade_goods set goods_status = #{goodsStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId} and seller_id = #{sellerId} and goods_status = #{expectStatus} and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_goods set goods_status = #{onSaleStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId} and goods_status = #{soldStatus} and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_goods set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId} and seller_id = #{sellerId} and goods_status in ('0', '1', '2', '3') and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select group_concat(image_url order by sort asc, image_id asc) from tr_trade_goods_image where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update tr_trade_goods_image set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into tr_trade_goods_image (goods_id, image_url, sort, create_by, create_time) values
(#{goodsId}, #{url}, #{idx}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
